description: Global history — myths, events, inventions, and anachronisms

cases.question: Did Marco Polo bring pasta from China and introduce it to Italy?
Did educated medieval Europeans generally believe the earth was flat?
Was Napoleon unusually short for his time?
Can the Great Wall of China be seen from space with the naked eye?
Did historical Vikings wear horned helmets in battle?
Was Magna Carta (1215) the origin of modern democracy and universal human rights?
Was the Boston Tea Party a protest against a British tax increase on tea?
Did the Wright brothers make the uncontested first flight in human history on 17 December 1903?
